---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: ['feature']
assignees: []
---

## Context
Describe the context — why this is needed and what the current situation is.

## Objective
What exactly should be achieved by this change?

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Issue has a clear Definition of Done
- [ ] Automated tests (unit/integration) added where appropriate
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / API spec) if applicable
- [ ] CI checks pass

## Notes / Alternatives considered
Any extra details, notes or alternatives considered
